text.title: AI Feature Brief Extension Pack Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from base PRD to validated, signed-off extended brief.

step.name: collect-base-prd
step.action: Confirm base PRD has problem, user, scope, success criteria. If missing, return to author before extending.

step.name: fill-model-section
step.action: Pin model name + version + provider; document fallback chain if provider deprecates within 12 months.

step.name: fill-eval-section
step.action: Pin golden_set_version + pass-rate threshold; specify which existing methodology (e.g. agent-trajectory-eval-method) emits the report.

step.name: fill-policy-and-cost-sections
step.action: For hallucination: pick {refuse, caveat, fall-through-to-human} per identified risk class. For cost: define per-request soft cap, per-day hard cap, outlier-cost alert threshold.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run scripts/validate-output.py; route to product+eng+finance; publish on sign-off.
step.output: Published extended brief; review log entry.
step.decision-gate: If any reviewer rejects a section, revise and re-route — never publish unsigned.
